summary: Completed testing of Admin Analytics Dashboard feature. Backend: 12/12 tests passed for /api/admin/revenue-trends and /api/admin/order-stats endpoints. Frontend: All analytics UI components verified - Analytics tab visible, summary cards, date range selectors, charts (Revenue Trend area chart, Orders by Period bar chart), and distribution sections (Order Status, Payment Methods).

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height (-1), charts still render correctly but may indicate sizing edge case

1_analytics_tab_visibility.details: Analytics tab appears in admin dashboard tabs between Overview and Orders. Tab has TrendingUp icon and 'Analytics' label.

2_revenue_trends_api.details: GET /api/admin/revenue-trends returns data with daily/weekly/monthly period options. Supports days parameter (7/30/90/180/365). Returns data array with date, label, revenue, orders, avg_order fields and summary with total_revenue, total_orders, avg_order_value, growth_percentage.

3_order_stats_api.details: GET /api/admin/order-stats returns status_distribution and payment_distribution objects. Each status/payment method includes count and revenue fields.

4_summary_cards.details: Analytics page shows 4 summary cards: Total Revenue (₹409.46), Total Orders (1), Avg Order Value (₹409.46), Growth (0%). Green trending up icon shown for growth.

5_revenue_trend_chart.details: Area chart with gradient fill renders correctly showing revenue over time. Shows data point for Feb 12 with ₹409.46 revenue. Y-axis shows ₹ values.

6_orders_by_period_chart.details: Bar chart renders with two data series - Orders (green) and Avg Order (₹) (blue). Legend and tooltip work correctly.

7_period_selector.details: Daily/Weekly/Monthly dropdown selector works. Changing selection triggers API call with new period parameter. Chart labels update correctly (e.g., '12 Feb' for daily, 'Week 7, 2026' for weekly, 'Feb 2026' for monthly).

8_days_selector.details: 7/30/90/180/365 days selector works. Options are 'Last 7 Days', 'Last 30 Days', 'Last 90 Days', 'Last 6 Months', 'Last Year'. Changing selection triggers API call with new days parameter.

9_order_status_distribution.details: Order Status Distribution section shows status breakdown with colored dots, count, progress bar, and percentage. Currently showing 'Delivered: 1 (100%)'. Status colors defined for pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/rto/cancelled.

10_payment_methods_distribution.details: Payment Methods section shows payment breakdown with count and revenue. Currently showing 'Unknown: ₹409.46 (100%)' as the existing order has null payment_mode.

backend_api_tests.test_revenue_trends_daily: PASSED - Returns data and summary with period='daily'
backend_api_tests.test_revenue_trends_data_format: PASSED - Data points have date, label, revenue, orders, avg_order
backend_api_tests.test_order_stats_status_distribution_for: PASSED - Each status has count and revenue
backend_api_tests.test_order_stats_payment_distribution_fo: PASSED - Each payment method has count and revenue
backend_api_tests.test_analytics_integration: PASSED - Complete analytics data flow works

critical_code_review_comments: Revenue trends endpoint correctly aggregates by daily/weekly/monthly periods using MongoDB aggregation
API properly filters paid orders only (payment_status in ['paid', 'completed']) for revenue calculation
Growth percentage calculated by comparing last two periods - shows 0% when only one order exists
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for analytics-period-select and analytics-days-select
Charts use recharts library with ResponsiveContainer and appropriate styling
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing order from database (from Feb 12) with revenue ₹409.46.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics dashboard fully functional. Currently shows 1 order with ₹409.46 revenue. Period selectors (Daily/Weekly/Monthly) and days selectors (7/30/90/180/365) work correctly. One minor console warning about recharts sizing that doesn't affect functionality. Payment method shows as 'Unknown' because existing order has null payment_mode.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All analytics features working as expected. No issues found during testing.
